overview: The WSXZ Package Filter reads Worldserver TKIT (`.wsxz`) package files. It is an extension of the Archive Filter that detects SDLXLIFF files for the specified language pair within the package and processes them using the XLIFF Filter with the `okf_xliff-sdl` configuration. Each SDLXLIFF file inside the package corresponds to a sub-document in the Okapi filter events.
limitations: TMX and TBX files inside the package are ignored.
Inherits all limitations of the [XLIFF Filter](XLIFF_Filter).
processingNotes: Extends the Archive Filter — package extraction and sub-document handling follow the same model.
Internally uses the XLIFF Filter with the `okf_xliff-sdl` configuration to process each SDLXLIFF file.
Each SDLXLIFF file in the package maps to a separate sub-document in the filter event stream.
